title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Software Without a Stripe Account — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: As a digital creator in Nigeria, selling software and getting paid is a constant struggle. No PayPal account? No problem, you think. But what about Stripe? Unfortunately, that's blocked too. You're left with a dwindling bank account, an avalanche of debt, and a dwindling sense of hope. The more you try to get paid, the more your bank account shrinks. You're not alone. Thousands of digital creators in restricted countries face the same problem. It's time to break free from the shackles of traditional payment processors and find a solution that actually works.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's break down each option. Gumroad is a popular choice, but it's not designed for creators selling software, and its fees can be steep. Payhip is another option, but its payment processing fees are around 2.9%. Most creators can't afford that. NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers a 0% fee on the first sale and a flat 0.5% fee on subsequent sales. It's a game-changer. But what about delivery and automation? That's where Web3 Wallet Connect comes in. This frontend wallet integration allows you to connect with your customers and deliver your software instantly. It's a seamless experience for both you and your customers.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe are notorious for blocking countries with high credit risk, but NOWPayments doesn't have the same restrictions. You can sell to customers in any country, without worrying about your account getting blocked. Gumroad and Payhip also have some restrictions, but they're not as severe as PayPal and Stripe's. With NOWPayments, you have the freedom to sell to anyone, anywhere in the world. That's the beauty of a crypto-native payment processor.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed is another crucial factor. NOWPayments offers instant payment processing, so you get paid as soon as the customer makes the payment. Gumroad and Payhip take longer to process payments, which means you'll have to wait longer to get paid. Web3 Wallet Connect also allows you to create multi-chain QR codes, making it easy for customers to pay with their preferred cryptocurrency. The real cost of using traditional payment processors is the high fees. With NOWPayments, you can avoid those fees and keep more of your hard-earned money.
Traditional payment processors are designed to make money from your sales, not help you get paid.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key to a smooth sales experience. Web3 Wallet Connect offers instant automated delivery, so customers get access to your software as soon as they make the payment. Gumroad and Payhip require manual intervention, which can lead to delays and errors. NOWPayments also offers automated delivery, but it's not as seamless as Web3 Wallet Connect's experience. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can focus on creating great software, while your customers enjoy a hassle-free experience.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

The choice is clear. NOWPayments offers the best payment processing fees, instant payment processing, and automation capabilities. Web3 Wallet Connect is the perfect frontend integration for your NOWPayments account, making it easy to connect with your customers and deliver your software instantly. If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, or any other restricted country, it's time to break free from traditional payment processors and join the crypto-native movement.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

So, can I still use PayPal and Stripe despite being in a restricted country? Unfortunately, no. Both PayPal and Stripe have strict policies against transactions with high credit risk, and your account will likely get blocked if you try to use them. Is NOWPayments a secure payment processor? Yes, it's a fully compliant payment processor that offers the same level of security as traditional payment processors.
NOWPayments offers instant payment processing, so you get paid as soon as the customer makes the payment.

Web3 Wallet Connect makes it easy to create and sell digital products, without the hassle of traditional payment processors. With NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect, you can focus on creating great software, while your customers enjoy a seamless experience.
